item.description:

Email: conner@lavineway.com
Phone: (204) 390-6536

Work Experience:

Instructor Guard
City of Winnipeg
August 2025 to Present
Responsibilities:
- Engage with and teach students of all ages
- Ensure lessons are fun and informative
- Watch and critique students swimming
- Ensure the safety of my Students, Patrons, Coworkers and Myself …
